work_authorisation_routes.name: Skilled Worker Visa
eligibility_criteria: Job offer from a UK Home Office-licensed sponsor
Role classified under an eligible SOC code for Product Manager
Salary meets the general threshold or the going rate for the occupation
English language at B1 level minimum

work_authorisation_routes.name: Global Talent Visa
eligibility_criteria: Endorsement from Tech Nation under the digital technology track
Evidence of significant product leadership contribution at industry level
Published work, conference talks, or notable product launches required

required_qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Business, Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent
3+ years of product management experience with demonstrable business impact
language_requirements: English B1 minimum (CEFR) for Skilled Worker Visa
Native or near-native English strongly preferred by most UK employers
credentials.degree_equivalency_notes: UK ENIC provides equivalency statements for foreign degrees. Business degrees from accredited universities worldwide are generally recognised. AACSB or EQUIS accreditation aids recognition.

market_demand.notes: Product Manager roles in the UK are heavily concentrated in London. Competition is moderate to high with many experienced candidates. Fintech and e-commerce sectors offer the most openings for international hires.
